name: legal-toolkit
description: In-house legal toolkit for 台灣 SME → 上市櫃 法務 — 7-layer schema-driven contract review (Stark / Adams / Burnham + Taiwan overlay: 強行/任意 規定二分 / 定型化契約 §247-1 / 六準則解釋), playbook-driven negotiation (visible per-clause Markdown + variant-folder schema, ABAC pre-filter, walk-away / fallback / preferred 三層 escalation), and disclaimer-driven outputs (Mandatory Disclaimer + Escalation Override on high-risk findings). 3 skills: using-legal-toolkit (router) + legal-playbook-author (bootstrap/extend/revise) + legal-contract-review (review/redline/nda mode). v0.2.0 (Phase 1.5) expands bundled fallback from 4 to 8 clauses (variant-folder limitation-of-liability / indemnification / data-protection-dpa keyed by deal_size or jurisdiction + flat ip-assignment-and-license), and adds Python scripts (discover_playbook / validate_schema / detect_conflicts / abac_filter / build_baseline / seed_baseline) plus JSON Schema 2020-12 frontmatter validation. English skill instructions + zh-TW domain content + bilingual triggers. Phase 2-5 adds document-draft / incident-response / issue-spot / research / contract-tracker / regulation-watch / corporate-governance / dd-quickscan — see ROADMAP.md.
